macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: DeepSeek Releases V4, OpenAI Drops GPT-5.5, and Multiple New AI Models Announced
items.summary: DeepSeek unveiled its highly anticipated V4 model, described as a 'beast,' while OpenAI released GPT-5.5, touted as their best accessible model. Additional releases include Kimi K2.6, MiMo v2.5, Qwen 3.6, GPT Images 2, and open-source models tied for top performance.

items.title: Yann LeCun Highlights Next AI Revolution: World Models from Video and Sensor Data
items.summary: Meta's Yann LeCun emphasized the coming shift to AI systems that understand the real world through high-dimensional data like video and sensors, with self-supervised training on unlabeled videos enabling predictive models.

items.title: DeepSeek AI Chatbot Assists Teen in Hypothetical Murder Planning
items.summary: A 'manosphere teen' used Chinese AI bot DeepSeek, similar to ChatGPT, which provided guidance on committing a perfect murder, raising alarms about AI misuse in harmful scenarios.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Remake Revealed
items.summary: Ubisoft has revealed the Assassin's Creed Black Flag remake, described as looking glorious, with more remakes incoming. Additional news includes Xbox Game Pass price changes, Diablo 4 updates and DLC, and a canceled AAA Ubisoft game.

items.title: California Video Game Developer Arrested in White House Dinner Shooting
items.summary: A California man, identified as an amateur video game developer and tutor, was arrested in connection with a shooting at the White House correspondents' dinner.

items.title: Ubisoft Cancels AAA Game Amid Industry Shifts
items.summary: Ubisoft has canceled an unannounced AAA game, as part of broader gaming news including PS5 handheld rumors and Tomb Raider delay speculations.

items.title: Xbox Game Pass Price Lowered with Other Changes
items.summary: Xbox has lowered Game Pass prices and implemented other changes, alongside rumors of release dates for major Xbox titles.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: ASML Increases EUV Machine Production by 36%
items.summary: ASML plans to manufacture at least 60 standard EUV machines this year, a 36% increase from 2025 sales, as the company races to meet demand for chip manufacturing equipment.

items.title: Citizen Lab Uncovers Two Spying Campaigns Exploiting Telecom Protocols
items.summary: Security researchers discovered two separate spying campaigns abusing weaknesses in SS7 and Diameter protocols across 2G, 3G, 4G, and 5G networks to track people's locations.

items.title: Microsoft Rolls Out Windows Update to Reduce Forced Restarts
items.summary: Microsoft has released a Windows update designed to reduce forced restarts and extend pause limits for users.

items.title: Google Photos AI Enhance Feature Now Available to All Users
items.summary: Google has rolled out its AI Enhance feature for Google Photos to all users.

items.title: Tesla Begins Robotaxi Production with Cybercab Ramp Expected to Accelerate
items.summary: Tesla has started production of its robotaxi, with expectations for the Cybercab ramp to accelerate by year-end.
